task_objective: Animate the upload arrow filling inside the cloud icon for the 'syncthing_uploading' status.
tests_added: renders the uploading cloud with a clipped fill rect over the arrow cutout
animates the arrow fill upward only for syncthing_uploading
design_decisions: Used a <rect> clipped with a <clipPath> over the arrow cutout to animate the fill.
Used a CSS keyframe animation 'arrow-fill-up' modifying 'translateY' to move the rect upward.
Avoided modifying the serializeSvgNode and instead hand-authored the SVG literal.
Maintained the cloud base and arrow cutout exactly as provided by IoMdCloudUpload to ensure pixel parity.
results: All tests passed and quality gates cleared. Implementation is complete and successfully added the requested uploading animation.
